name: Dulce Tres Leches
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites to a merengue.
2. Add the egg yolks and continue beating.
3. Gradually add the flour mixture, mixing until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased mold(s) and bake at 350°F for about 30-40 minutes, or until done.
5. Check the cake's doneness by inserting a toothpick; it should come out clean.
6. For the milk mixture, combine all ingredients and pour over the cooled cake.
7. To make the frosting, cook the sugar and water until they form a syrup.
8. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
9. Gradually add the syrup to the beaten egg whites while continuously beating.
